title: Smokey Fromage Creamy Brunch
description: A smoky and creamy dish featuring fromage frais that is perfect for a brunch or breakfast setting.

ingredients.name: flour tortillas or whole grain toast

instructions: Mix together fromage frais, smoked paprika, chicken broth, and olive oil in a small bowl.
Whisk in lemon juice until smooth. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Heat tortillas or toast the bread slices lightly on both sides.
Spread the fromage cream sauce evenly over the hot tortillas or toast.
Top each spread with grated Parmesan cheese, allowing it to melt slightly under heat if using toasted bread.
